name: Soulforge Aptitude
descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Pontos deals +[Arg3]% {Fixed DMG} to "Kindreds of Rapture."
{Relentless Hunt} gains {Tentacle DMG} equal to [Arg4]% of ATK for every 10 Aliemus consumed. When {Gaunt Ravage} deals DMG, it also temporarily reduces the target's {STR▼} by an amount equal to [Arg5]% of DEF.
